mnemonics: CIE-FIE: Continuous Internal Evaluation - Feedback Is Essential (for AI model improvement)
keyPoints: Continuous Evaluation provides constant feedback on AI model performance.
It helps identify performance degradation or concept drift in real-time.
It is a key component of MLOps for maintaining healthy AI systems in production.
commonMistakes: Confusing Continuous Evaluation with the initial model training phase.
Setting evaluation metrics that don't align with actual business objectives.
Neglecting to automate the evaluation pipeline, making it sporadic instead of continuous.
